title: Founder's Associate
key_evidence: Live on Ashby. ~8-11 person team (PitchBook 11, Built In 8), $4.5M seed (14x oversubscribed) from Northzone + Initialized. Tiny team => CEO/CTO/Chief-of-Staff read applications directly. Excellent screening + warm-path.

Hard pedigree gate: 'What we're looking for: 2-4 years at MBB, a top-tier investment bank, or a high-growth startup in an analytical or operational role.' Ryan is NOT MBB/IB, but DOES qualify via the 'high-growth startup in an analytical or operational role' path (first employee, Founder's Associate at Minima seed->Series A). The MBB/IB framing signals they want consultant-grade structure/analytics — a stretch for Ryan's community-growth-led profile.

Role content maps well to Ryan's FA experience: fundraising support (built decks, investor updates at Minima), GTM strategy+execution, operations, hiring ops, market research. The headline current need is 'converting pipeline into closed deals' — enterprise sales-assist, which is adjacent but not Ryan's strength (he did community-led conversion, not enterprise deal closing).

Domain = Testing/Inspection/Certification AI for aerospace, healthcare, energy, manufacturing. Explicitly OUTSIDE Ryan's crypto/Web3+AI-tooling domain — requires regulatory/compliance domain ramp he lacks.

Team is ex-X/Google/Amazon/Yandex/McKinsey + ex-FUSE Energy unicorn founding engineers — high-bar, technical/consulting-heavy culture. Ryan's non-technical, non-consulting background is a cultural-fit risk against this stated bar.
In-person Shoreditch — aligns with Ryan's London relocation. No salary published; likely sub/around £50k for a seed FA.
biggest_lever: Genuine founder-read on a sub-12-person team; Ryan's first-employee FA-at-seed-to-Series-A story is exactly the 'build a company' narrative the role courts.
biggest_risk: MBB/IB-flavoured pedigree bar + heavily technical/consulting team culture + regulated TIC domain (aerospace/medtech) outside Ryan's domain; current need is enterprise deal-closing, not community growth.
apply_verdict: Apply — but lead hard with the 'high-growth startup operator, seed->Series A, $4.5m presale + fundraising support' angle to clear the non-MBB path, and acknowledge the domain ramp. Net-positive bet due to strong founder-read odds.
recency_note: Ashby posting-api publishedAt=2025-12-02 => 189 days (>>12wk, very stale). Single FA listing, no repost. Likely a long-lived evergreen FA req on a tiny 8-11p seed co rather than a fresh opening. >12wk => base G=10; tiny low-volume startup => +5 => G=15. Date source: api.ashbyhq.com/posting-api/job-board/seamflow (jobId fcabd41c).
